append-empty-a4-page-to-pdf.title: Append Empty A4 Page to PDF
append-empty-a4-page-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, add a blank page at the end, resize it to A4 dimensions, and save the updated document.

insert-blank-page-at-index-three.title: Insert Blank Page at Specific Index
insert-blank-page-at-index-three.description: Shows how to load a PDF, insert a blank page at index three using the PageCollection.Insert method, and save the modified document.

insert-page-with-same-size-as-page-two.title: Insert New Page with Same Size as Page Two
insert-page-with-same-size-as-page-two.description: The example loads a PDF, reads the dimensions of page 2, inserts a new empty page at position 5, and sets the new page to the same width and height as page 2 before saving the document.

add-multiple-empty-pages-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Empty Pages to PDF Sequentially
add-multiple-empty-pages-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over a list of page counts, add the specified number of empty pages, and save the updated document.

read-pdf-page-dimensions.title: Read PDF Page Dimensions with Aspose.Pdf
read-pdf-page-dimensions.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through all pages, and logs each page's width and height to the console.

resize-seventh-pdf-page-to-letter-size.title: Resize Seventh PDF Page to Letter Size
resize-seventh-pdf-page-to-letter-size.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access the seventh page, and change its dimensions to the standard Letter size using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-all-pdf-pages-to-a5.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5 Size
resize-all-pdf-pages-to-a5.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through its pages, resize each page to A5 dimensions, and save the modified document.

rotate-fourth-page-90-degrees.title: Rotate Fourth PDF Page 90 Degrees Clockwise
rotate-fourth-page-90-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF, verify it has a fourth page, rotate that page 90° clockwise, and save the modified document.

convert-odd-pages-to-portrait.title: Convert Odd-Numbered PDF Pages to Portrait Orientation
convert-odd-pages-to-portrait.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over odd-numbered pages and, if a page is in landscape, swaps its MediaBox dimensions to make it portrait, then saves the result.

move-page-9-to-first-position.title: Move Page 9 to First Position in PDF
move-page-9-to-first-position.description: Shows how to reposition a specific page in a PDF by inserting it at a new index and deleting the original using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-custom-sequence.title: Reorder PDF Pages Using a Custom Sequence
reorder-pdf-pages-custom-sequence.description: Shows how to reorder the pages of a PDF document by providing a custom integer array that defines the new page order using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-last-three-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Last Three Pages from PDF
delete-last-three-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, remove the last three pages using PageCollection.Delete, and save the modified document.

delete-range-of-pdf-pages.title: Delete a Range of PDF Pages
delete-range-of-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to remove pages 5 through 10 from a PDF document in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-empty-page-custom-size-beginning-.title: Insert Empty Page with Custom Size at Beginning of PDF
insert-empty-page-custom-size-beginning-.description: Demonstrates how to add a new blank page with specific dimensions (200 × 300 points) to the start of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

append-page-from-source-pdf-to-target.title: Append Page from Source PDF to Target PDF
append-page-from-source-pdf-to-target.description: Shows how to load two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, copy a page from the source document, and append it to the end of the target document without altering existing content.

duplicate-page-three.title: Duplicate Page Three and Insert After Original
duplicate-page-three.description: Creates a PDF, then duplicates the third page and inserts the copy immediately after it.

rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate every page by 180° clockwise, and save the modified document.

convert-pdf-pages-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Pages from Portrait to Landscape
convert-pdf-pages-portrait-to-landscape.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, swaps the MediaBox width and height using SetPageSize to change the orientation to landscape, and saves the modified document.

insert-blank-page-after-each-page.title: Insert Blank Page After Each PDF Page
insert-blank-page-after-each-page.description: Shows how to double a PDF's page count by inserting a blank page after every existing page using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-by-parity.title: Rotate PDF Pages Based on Page Number Parity
rotate-pdf-pages-by-parity.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, rotate even‑numbered pages by 90° while leaving odd pages unchanged, and save the modified document.

export-pdf-page-dimensions-to-csv.title: Export PDF Page Dimensions to CSV
export-pdf-page-dimensions-to-csv.description: Shows how to read each page's width and height from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write the results to a CSV file for external analysis.

insert-page-from-another-pdf.title: Insert Page from Another PDF at Specific Position
insert-page-from-another-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to copy a page from a source PDF and insert it into a target PDF at index two while preserving the original page size and rotation.

resize-first-pdf-page-custom-dimensions.title: Resize First PDF Page to Custom Dimensions
resize-first-pdf-page-custom-dimensions.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the first page size to 500 × 700 points, and save the modified document.

rotate-pdf-pages-reverse-order.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order (90° Clockwise)
rotate-pdf-pages-reverse-order.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotating each page 90 degrees clockwise starting from the last page and moving backwards, then saving the result.

move-pages-3-6-to-end.title: Move Pages 3‑6 to End of PDF
move-pages-3-6-to-end.description: Shows how to relocate a range of pages (pages 3 through 6) to the end of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-mediabox-page-8-to-page-12.title: Copy MediaBox from Page 8 to Page 12
copy-mediabox-page-8-to-page-12.description: Demonstrates how to read the MediaBox rectangle from one PDF page and apply it to another page using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring both pages share identical dimensions.

insert-ten-empty-pages-at-pdf-midpoint.title: Insert Ten Empty Pages at PDF Midpoint
insert-ten-empty-pages-at-pdf-midpoint.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, calculating its midpoint, and batch‑inserting ten blank pages at that position.

resize-wide-pdf-pages-to-a4.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
resize-wide-pdf-pages-to-a4.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF, detect pages wider than 600 points, and resize those pages to A4 dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pdf-pages-from-config.title: Delete PDF Pages Using Configured Page Numbers
delete-pdf-pages-from-config.description: Shows how to read a list of page numbers from an external text file and delete those pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-descending.title: Reorder PDF Pages in Descending Order
reorder-pdf-pages-descending.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a new document, copy pages from the source to the destination in reverse numeric order, optionally balance the page tree, and save the reordered file.

convert-all-pdf-pages-to-portrait.title: Convert All PDF Pages to Portrait Orientation
convert-all-pdf-pages-to-portrait.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, detect landscape pages via MediaBox dimensions, swap width and height with SetPageSize to make them portrait, and save the modified document.

conditionally-rotate-pdf-pages.title: Conditionally Rotate PDF Pages by 90 Degrees
conditionally-rotate-pdf-pages.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, and rotates every third page by 90 degrees before saving the result.

delete-first-page-from-pdf.title: Delete First Page from PDF
delete-first-page-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove the first page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, with remaining pages automatically shifting forward.

resize-pdf-pages-uniform-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Uniform Size
resize-pdf-pages-uniform-size.description: Demonstrates how to find the largest page dimensions in a PDF and resize all pages to that size for uniformity using Aspose.Pdf.

restore-original-page-rotation.title: Restore Original Page Rotation in PDF
restore-original-page-rotation.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page, perform operations while rotated, and then reset the page to its original orientation using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-resize-reinsert-pdf-pages.title: Extract, Resize to A4, and Reinsert PDF Pages
extract-resize-reinsert-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to extract a range of pages from a PDF, change each page size to A4, remove the original pages, and insert the resized pages at a new position.

move-even-pages-to-end.title: Move Even Pages to End of PDF
move-even-pages-to-end.description: Shows how to extract even‑numbered pages from a PDF and append them to the end, preserving their original order.

resize-pdf-pages-to-match-template.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Dimensions
resize-pdf-pages-to-match-template.description: Shows how to load a template PDF, read its page dimensions, and resize every page of another PDF to those dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-by-configurable-angles.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Configurable Angles
rotate-pdf-pages-by-configurable-angles.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read a dictionary of page numbers to rotation angles, apply the specified rotation to each page, and save the modified document.

add-transparent-separator-page.title: Add Transparent Separator Page to PDF
add-transparent-separator-page.description: Shows how to append an empty page with a fully transparent background to an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-last-page-from-pdfs.title: Delete Last Page from PDFs in a Folder
delete-last-page-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a directory, remove the last page of each document using Aspose.Pdf, and overwrite the original files.

move-pdf-page-to-another-document.title: Move a PDF Page to Another Document Preserving Rotation and Size
move-pdf-page-to-another-document.description: Demonstrates how to extract a specific page from one PDF and insert it into another PDF while keeping the original page rotation and dimensions, then saves the updated documents.

set-custom-mediabox-for-pdf-page.title: Set Custom MediaBox for a PDF Page
set-custom-mediabox-for-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to change a page's MediaBox rectangle to define a custom cropping region without modifying the page content, using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-pages-fixed-width.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fixed Width While Preserving Aspect Ratio
resize-pdf-pages-fixed-width.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and resizes them to a target width of 800 points while maintaining the original aspect ratio, then saves the result.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to read page numbers from a text file and delete those pages from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-by-orientation.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Orientation (Landscape then Portrait)
reorder-pdf-pages-by-orientation.description: Loads a PDF, separates its pages into landscape and portrait groups, then creates a new PDF with all landscape pages first followed by portrait pages.

add-blank-front-matter-page-with-custom-.title: Add Blank Front-Matter Page with Custom Label
add-blank-front-matter-page-with-custom-.description: Demonstrates how to insert a blank page at the beginning of a PDF and assign it a custom page label "i" for front‑matter numbering using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-pages-to-fit-printable-area.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fit Printable Area
resize-pdf-pages-to-fit-printable-area.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, calculating a uniform scaling factor for each page, and resizing the pages so the content fits within an A4 printable area (595 × 842 points). The modified document is then saved.

insert-empty-page-custom-size.title: Insert Empty Page with Custom Size into PDF
insert-empty-page-custom-size.description: Shows how to add a blank page of user‑specified dimensions at a chosen position in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-pages-to-template-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-template-size.description: Shows how to resize every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a reference template PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-to-first-pdf-page-using-margi.title: Add Header to First PDF Page Using MarginInfo
add-header-to-first-pdf-page-using-margi.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a HeaderFooter with a default MarginInfo, adds a text fragment as the header, assigns it to the first page, and saves the modified document.

add-html-header-to-first-three-pdf-pages.title: Add HTML Header with CSS to First Three PDF Pages
add-html-header-to-first-three-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to insert an HTML header with embedded CSS styling onto the first three pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-scaled-image-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Scaled Image Footer to Each PDF Page
add-scaled-image-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and add a proportionally scaled footer image to each page before saving the document.

add-image-footer-30-opacity-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Image Footer with 30% Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-footer-30-opacity-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place an image footer with 30% opacity on every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-date-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Date Footer to Each PDF Page
add-date-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a text footer containing the current date to every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Diagonal Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent diagonal text watermark on every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Rotated Image Watermark to PDF
add-rotated-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp, scale it to half the page size, rotate it 45 degrees, center it, and save the watermarked document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-watermark-with-opacity-to-pdf-.title: Add Image Watermark with Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-watermark-with-opacity-to-pdf-.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent image (e.g., a logo) on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-repeating-image-watermark-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Repeating Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-repeating-image-watermark-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent image watermark repeatedly in a grid pattern across each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-year-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Year Watermark to PDF Pages
add-year-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a TextStamp containing the current year, apply it to every page, and save the watermarked document.

curved-text-watermark.title: Add Curved Text Watermark to PDF
curved-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates adding a text watermark that follows a curved path across a PDF page using WatermarkArtifact.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark-outl.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark with Outline to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark-outl.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and adds a centered text stamp as a watermark with semi‑transparent fill and an outline stroke, then saves the modified document.

add-lightgray-background-to-pdf-pages.title: Add LightGray Background to PDF Pages
add-lightgray-background-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to set a LightGray background color for every page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-transparent-background-for-pdf-pages.title: Set Transparent Background for PDF Pages
set-transparent-background-for-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the document and each page background to transparent, and save the modified file.

set-pdf-page-background-color.title: Set PDF Page Background Color
set-pdf-page-background-color.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, define an RGB brand color, apply it as the background for each page, and save the modified document.

set-pdf-page-background-cmyk.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
set-pdf-page-background-cmyk.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply a CMYK background color to each page, and save the modified document.

set-pdf-page-background-hsl.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using HSL Values
set-pdf-page-background-hsl.description: Shows how to convert HSL color values to RGB and apply the resulting color as a page background in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-background-by-theme.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Based on Theme Configuration
set-pdf-page-background-by-theme.description: Shows how to read a user‑selected theme from a JSON file and apply the corresponding background color to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-alternating-page-background-colors.title: Set Alternating Page Background Colors in PDF
set-alternating-page-background-colors.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and assign LightGray or White background colors alternately before saving the document.

add-centered-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Centered Page Numbers to PDF Pages
add-centered-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a centered page number stamp that starts at 1 on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-roman-page-numbers.title: Insert Roman Numeral Page Numbers into PDF
insert-roman-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, adding Roman numeral page numbers to the first few pages using a PageNumberStamp, and saving the result.

add-chapter-prefixed-page-numbers.title: Add Chapter‑Prefixed Page Numbers to PDF
add-chapter-prefixed-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers with a custom "Chapter" prefix into every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

add-leading-zero-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Leading-Zero Page Numbers to PDF
add-leading-zero-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, creates a PageNumberStamp with a format that pads single‑digit page numbers with a leading zero, applies the stamp to every page, and saves the modified document.

add-page-numbers-custom-format-pdf.title: Add Page Numbers (Page X of Y) to PDF
add-page-numbers-custom-format-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, creates a PageNumberStamp with the format "Page X of Y", positions it at the bottom center of each page, and saves the updated document.

add-page-numbers-with-total-to-pdf.title: Add Page Numbers with Total Count to PDF
add-page-numbers-with-total-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, creates a PageNumberStamp using a custom "current/total" format, applies it to every page, and saves the updated document.

add-superscript-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Superscript Page Numbers to PDF Pages
add-superscript-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, creates a PageNumberStamp with a smaller font and upward offset to simulate superscript, places it at the bottom‑right of each page, and saves the updated document.

add-page-numbers-with-custom-font.title: Add Page Numbers with Custom Arial Font to PDF
add-page-numbers-with-custom-font.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a PageNumberStamp, set the font to Arial size 14, and apply the stamp to every page before saving.

add-page-numbers-with-custom-ttf-font.title: Add Page Numbers Using a Custom TTF Font
add-page-numbers-with-custom-ttf-font.description: Loads a PDF, embeds an external TrueType font, and adds page numbers to every page using a PageNumberStamp configured with the custom font.

add-page-numbers-to-odd-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Odd PDF Pages
add-page-numbers-to-odd-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert page numbers only on odd-numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf. The example iterates through pages, creates a PageNumberStamp, positions it, and saves the modified document.

add-page-numbers-to-even-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Even PDF Pages
add-page-numbers-to-even-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over even-numbered pages, and add a page-number stamp to each of those pages.

insert-page-numbers-after-toc.title: Insert Page Numbers After Table of Contents Using Bookmarks
insert-page-numbers-after-toc.description: Loads a PDF, locates the Table of Contents bookmark, and adds page‑number stamps to all pages that follow the TOC.

add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to apply Bates numbering starting at 1000 with a dash suffix to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-with-custom-prefix-s.title: Add Bates Numbering with Custom Prefix and Suffix to PDF
add-bates-numbering-with-custom-prefix-s.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply Bates numbering with a custom "DOC" prefix and "-2026" suffix, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-with-prefix.title: Add Bates Numbering with Alphanumeric Prefix to PDF
add-bates-numbering-with-prefix.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply Bates numbering with a custom alphanumeric prefix, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages__v2.title: Add Bates Numbering (2026-####) to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages__v2.description: Loads a PDF document, applies Bates numbering with the format "2026-####" to each page, and saves the modified file.

batch-add-bates-numbering-pdfs.title: Batch Add Bates Numbering to PDFs with Increment of 5
batch-add-bates-numbering-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, add Bates numbering to each document, and increase the start number by 5 for the next file using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-bates-numbering-in-pdf.title: Replace Bates Numbering in a PDF
replace-bates-numbering-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete all existing Bates numbering artifacts from a PDF and then add a new Bates numbering sequence with custom settings using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-bates-numbering-from-pdf-pages.title: Remove Bates Numbering from PDF Pages
remove-bates-numbering-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to delete Bates numbering stamps from selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's DeleteBatesNumbering method and save the result.

replace-pdf-headers-footers.title: Replace PDF Headers and Footers
replace-pdf-headers-footers.description: Demonstrates how to remove any existing header and footer from each page of a PDF and assign new header and footer content using Aspose.Pdf.

read-pdf-page-count.title: Read PDF Page Count with Aspose.Pdf
read-pdf-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of pages without saving the document.

read-page-dimensions-from-pdf.title: Read Page Dimensions from PDF
read-page-dimensions-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through each page, and logs the page width and height in points.

adjust-pdf-bleedbox.title: Adjust PDF BleedBox for Printer Bleed
adjust-pdf-bleedbox.description: Shows how to read each page's BleedBox, expand it by a margin for printer bleed, and save the modified PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

retrieve-trimbox-after-cropping.title: Retrieve TrimBox Values After Cropping a PDF Page
retrieve-trimbox-after-cropping.description: Loads a PDF, optionally applies a CropBox to each page, then reads and prints the TrimBox coordinates to verify the content area after cropping.

crop-pdf-pages-remove-margins.title: Crop PDF Pages to Remove Margins
crop-pdf-pages-remove-margins.description: Shows how to set the CropBox of each PDF page using rectangle coordinates to trim margins with Aspose.Pdf.

extend-bleedbox-beyond-cropbox.title: Extend BleedBox Beyond CropBox in PDF
extend-bleedbox-beyond-cropbox.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read each page's CropBox, create a BleedBox that extends 5 points on all sides, assign it to the page, and save the updated document.

trim-white-space-around-pdf-pages.title: Trim White Space Around PDF Pages
trim-white-space-around-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to remove surrounding white space from each PDF page by calculating the content bounding box and assigning it to the page's TrimBox using Aspose.Pdf.

trim-whitespace-with-tolerance.title: Trim whitespace and delete blank pages using tolerance
trim-whitespace-with-tolerance.description: Demonstrates how to remove blank PDF pages based on a pixel‑tolerance factor and set a tighter TrimBox for each page using Aspose.Pdf.

crop-pdf-pages-to-4-3-aspect-ratio.title: Crop PDF Pages to 4:3 Aspect Ratio
crop-pdf-pages-to-4-3-aspect-ratio.description: Shows how to crop each page of a PDF to a fixed 4:3 aspect ratio by adjusting the CropBox using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-logo-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header Logo Image to PDF Pages
add-header-logo-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to insert a company logo as a left‑aligned header on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bold-uppercase-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Bold Uppercase Header to PDF Pages
add-bold-uppercase-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Loads an existing PDF, iterates over each page, and adds a header containing bold, uppercase text before saving the modified document.
